dataset_name: LapisAI Enterprise Knowledge Assistant Ground Truth - Production Split
description: Massive 100-item golden dataset (50 EN, 50 ID) for production-grade evaluation. Includes 80 answerable and 20 adversarial unanswerable questions to rigorously evaluate Retrieval and Generation quality.

evaluation_policy.development_split_usage: Use for tuning and threshold setting.

items.question: If an employee has a spouse and four children, will the entire family receive full medical coverage under the corporate policy?
items.expected_answer: No, the company health insurance plan covers the employee and a maximum of three dependents.
query_variants: If an employee has a spouse and four children, will the entire family receive full medical coverage under the corporate policy?
health insurance coverage limit for employee dependents family

items.question: What is the maximum storage limit allowed for an employee's corporate electronic mail?
items.expected_answer: The standard mailbox quota is 50 GB.
query_variants: What is the maximum storage limit allowed for an employee's corporate electronic mail?
employee corporate email mailbox quota maximum capacity

items.question: What is the financial penalty for losing your building entry badge?
items.expected_answer: A replacement access card costs IDR 50,000.
query_variants: What is the financial penalty for losing your building entry badge?
replacement fee lost access card IDR

items.question: If today is the 26th of the month, which portal should staff access to view their latest compensation details?
items.expected_answer: Staff should access the HR portal under My Documents to view their payslips.
query_variants: If today is the 26th of the month, which portal should staff access to view their latest compensation details?
where to find payslips after the 25th HR portal My Documents

items.question: If I forget the credentials to log into the internal system, what is the procedure and the maximum time limit for recovery?
items.expected_answer: Raise a ticket to the IT Helpdesk via the portal. Resets are processed within 1x24 hours.
query_variants: If I forget the credentials to log into the internal system, what is the procedure and the maximum time limit for recovery?
password reset procedure IT helpdesk SLA 1x24 hours

items.question: Dokumen fisik atau identifikasi spesifik apa yang wajib dibawa oleh karyawan baru pada hari orientasi pertama?
items.expected_answer: Karyawan baru harus membawa ID yang valid (KTP), NPWP (Tax ID), dan detail rekening bank.
query_variants: Dokumen fisik atau identifikasi spesifik apa yang wajib dibawa oleh karyawan baru pada hari orientasi pertama?
syarat dokumen onboarding karyawan baru hari pertama NPWP rekening

items.question: Jika tanggal 25 Desember adalah Hari Raya Natal, pada hari apa karyawan akan menerima upah bulanan mereka?
items.expected_answer: Gaji akan dibayarkan pada hari kerja sebelumnya jika tanggal 25 jatuh pada hari libur.
query_variants: Jika tanggal 25 Desember adalah Hari Raya Natal, pada hari apa karyawan akan menerima upah bulanan mereka?
jadwal pembayaran gaji payroll jika tanggal 25 jatuh pada hari libur

items.question: Jika saya membeli meja ergonomis senilai Rp 2.000.000 untuk keperluan WFH, berapa nominal maksimal yang akan diganti perusahaan, dan apakah saya wajib melampirkan nota asli?
items.expected_answer: Perusahaan mengganti maksimal IDR 1.500.000 (tunjangan home-office). Karena nilainya di atas IDR 150.000, Anda wajib melampirkan nota fisik asli.
query_variants: Jika saya membeli meja ergonomis senilai Rp 2.000.000 untuk keperluan WFH, berapa nominal maksimal yang akan diganti perusahaan, dan apakah saya wajib melampirkan nota asli?
reimbursement home office allowance WFH nota asli di atas 150 ribu

items.question: Jika ada email masuk yang mendesak dari CEO meminta detail transfer kawat, tetapi alamat pengirimnya terlihat sedikit salah eja, apa yang harus saya lakukan?
items.expected_answer: Jangan mengklik tautan atau membalas; segera laporkan email tersebut menggunakan tombol Report Phishing.
query_variants: Jika ada email masuk yang mendesak dari CEO meminta detail transfer kawat, tetapi alamat pengirimnya terlihat sedikit salah eja, apa yang harus saya lakukan?
prosedur pelaporan email mencurigakan phishing tombol report

items.question: Siapa yang memegang otoritas persetujuan akhir ketika seorang developer membutuhkan lisensi untuk IDE perangkat lunak baru?
items.expected_answer: System owner (pemilik sistem) memegang otoritas persetujuan akhir setelah permintaan diajukan melalui IT Service Desk.
query_variants: Siapa yang memegang otoritas persetujuan akhir ketika seorang developer membutuhkan lisensi untuk IDE perangkat lunak baru?
persetujuan system owner untuk request akses lisensi software IT service desk

items.question: Does the company provide financial support or insurance subsidies for employee's veterinary bills?
items.expected_answer: No, the benefits FAQ does not list pet insurance or veterinary subsidies under covered dependents.
query_variants: Does the company provide financial support or insurance subsidies for employee's veterinary bills?
pet insurance veterinary bill coverage employee benefits

items.question: How do I reserve a hot-desk if I plan to work from the main office tomorrow?
items.expected_answer: Employees must reserve a hot-desk via the Facility Booking portal at least 24 hours in advance.
query_variants: How do I reserve a hot-desk if I plan to work from the main office tomorrow?
hot desk reservation main office procedure

items.question: Will my pay be docked if I badge into the office 15 minutes after my scheduled shift starts?
items.expected_answer: The payroll FAQ states that tardiness beyond 30 minutes without prior notice may result in deductions; 15 minutes is within the grace period.
query_variants: Will my pay be docked if I badge into the office 15 minutes after my scheduled shift starts?
late arrival salary deduction grace period

items.question: Can I request a dual monitor setup to be delivered to my home office?
items.expected_answer: No, physical hardware delivery is restricted to the primary laptop. External monitors must be purchased using the home-office allowance.
query_variants: Can I request a dual monitor setup to be delivered to my home office?
dual monitor delivery request WFH setup

items.question: Apakah diperbolehkan membawa balita atau anak-anak ke area kerja pada hari Jumat?
items.expected_answer: Area kerja terlarang untuk anak-anak demi alasan keselamatan; anak hanya diizinkan di lobi atau fasilitas penitipan jika tersedia.
query_variants: Apakah diperbolehkan membawa balita atau anak-anak ke area kerja pada hari Jumat?
aturan membawa anak balita ke kantor jumat

items.question: Bagaimana cara mereset atau mendapatkan kata sandi jaringan nirkabel (WiFi) untuk tamu yang berkunjung?
items.expected_answer: Kata sandi WiFi tamu dirotasi setiap minggu dan dapat diminta langsung ke resepsionis gedung.
query_variants: Bagaimana cara mereset atau mendapatkan kata sandi jaringan nirkabel (WiFi) untuk tamu yang berkunjung?
cara mendapatkan password wifi tamu guest

items.question: Apakah ada aturan berpakaian (dress code) khusus saat ada jadwal bertemu klien di hari kerja?
items.expected_answer: Standarnya adalah *smart casual*, namun karyawan wajib menggunakan pakaian bisnis formal (business attire) saat menghadiri pertemuan klien eksternal.
query_variants: Apakah ada aturan berpakaian (dress code) khusus saat ada jadwal bertemu klien di hari kerja?
aturan dress code pakaian bertemu klien eksternal

items.question: Berapa lama durasi periode evaluasi sebelum saya resmi diangkat menjadi pegawai tetap (PKWTT)?
items.expected_answer: Masa percobaan (probation) standar berlangsung selama 3 bulan, setelah itu manajer akan melakukan evaluasi kelayakan status tetap.
query_variants: Berapa lama durasi periode evaluasi sebelum saya resmi diangkat menjadi pegawai tetap (PKWTT)?
durasi masa percobaan probation pegawai baru

items.question: If an employee experiences inappropriate workplace behavior but fears retaliation from their direct manager, what are the approved secure avenues to escalate the issue?
items.expected_answer: The complaint can be raised confidentially directly to HR or via the whistleblower channel.
query_variants: If an employee experiences inappropriate workplace behavior but fears retaliation from their direct manager, what are the approved secure avenues to escalate the issue?
report harassment confidentially HR whistleblower channel

items.question: Can I check my corporate inbox on my own private iPad without any prior IT setup?
items.expected_answer: No, personal devices used for work email must first be enrolled in the mobile device management (MDM) system.
query_variants: Can I check my corporate inbox on my own private iPad without any prior IT setup?
BYOD policy personal device work email MDM enrollment

items.question: If my spouse's consulting firm is bidding on a contract with our company, how and to whom should I report this situation?
items.expected_answer: This is a potential conflict of interest and must be disclosed to HR in writing.
query_variants: If my spouse's consulting firm is bidding on a contract with our company, how and to whom should I report this situation?
conflict of interest disclosure procedure HR in writing

items.question: If an engineer accidentally leaves a laptop containing unencrypted client records at a coffee shop at 2:00 PM, what is the absolute latest time they can notify the company, and how?
items.expected_answer: The breach must be reported by 3:00 PM (within 1 hour) to security@nusantaradynamics.co.id.
query_variants: If an engineer accidentally leaves a laptop containing unencrypted client records at a coffee shop at 2:00 PM, what is the absolute latest time they can notify the company, and how?
report suspected data breach SLA email address within 1 hour

items.question: What are the four tiers of data sensitivity recognized by the organization?
items.expected_answer: The four tiers are Public, Internal, Confidential, and Restricted.
query_variants: What are the four tiers of data sensitivity recognized by the organization?
information classification levels public internal confidential restricted

items.question: Jika menjelang akhir tahun saya masih memiliki jatah cuti 10 hari yang belum terpakai, berapa hari yang akan hangus?
items.expected_answer: Hanya maksimal 6 hari yang bisa dibawa ke tahun depan, sehingga 4 hari cuti Anda akan hangus.
query_variants: Jika menjelang akhir tahun saya masih memiliki jatah cuti 10 hari yang belum terpakai, berapa hari yang akan hangus?
maximum unused annual leave carry over policy 6 days

items.question: Jika saya membuat kredensial akun sepanjang 10 karakter, mengandung angka, huruf besar, dan simbol, apakah itu sudah mematuhi standar keamanan perusahaan?
items.expected_answer: Tidak. Kata sandi harus minimal 12 karakter, menyertakan huruf besar, huruf kecil, angka, dan simbol, serta diganti setiap 90 hari.

password policy requirements complexity 12 characters rotation 90 days

items.question: Tingkat manajerial mana yang harus memberikan otorisasi untuk pembelian peralatan server dengan harga IDR 25 juta?
items.expected_answer: Kepala departemen (department head) menyetujui pembelian bernilai dari IDR 10 juta hingga IDR 50 juta.
query_variants: Tingkat manajerial mana yang harus memberikan otorisasi untuk pembelian peralatan server dengan harga IDR 25 juta?
procurement approval threshold IDR 10-50 million department head

items.question: Berapa batas uang saku makan harian ketika melakukan perjalanan dinas di dalam negeri?

query_variants: Berapa batas uang saku makan harian ketika melakukan perjalanan dinas di dalam negeri?

items.expected_answer: Hari libur tidak mewajibkan jam kerja reguler. Sistem libur nasional (FAQ_Payroll) menggantikan jam inti wajib (core hours WFH).

remote work core hours 10:00-16:00 WIB availability during holiday

items.question: Can I accept a $50 gift basket sent to the office from a satisfied vendor?

accepting gifts from vendor limit policy

storing company data on personal cloud storage policy

items.expected_answer: Business class is only permitted for continuous international flights exceeding 8 hours.

items.question: Do I need to officially disclose to HR if I start a romantic relationship with a coworker who works in a completely different department?

workplace romance policy disclosure requirements HR

items.question: Apakah saya diperbolehkan menginstal perangkat lunak hiburan (seperti game) di komputer inventaris perusahaan yang saya bawa pulang?

items.question: Jika manajer IT saya menyetujui pengadaan kursi WFH seharga Rp 15 juta, apakah pembelian itu otomatis diproses oleh Procurement?
items.expected_answer: Tidak, karena pengadaan di atas Rp 10 juta memerlukan tanda tangan Kepala Departemen (Department Head), bukan hanya Manajer. Selain itu, kursi tidak masuk anggaran IT.

CSAT 2025 score increase Net Promoter Score NPS metrics
